headline: PASS THE QP VIVA
subheading: How eligibility, sponsorship and the panel interview confirm you are fit to certify batches.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking a high-stakes professional assessment in pharmaceutical quality. A polished deep navy meeting table stretches into shallow depth of field, where a single empty chair faces a softly blurred arc of three out-of-focus assessor silhouettes implied only as gentle teal-lit forms. Across the foreground, three luminous frosted-glass pillars rise at staggered heights, symbolising the three pillars of eligibility, each catching a cool cyan glow. A floating translucent document and a softly glowing approval checkmark hover near a refined teal pen, suggesting a signed study record and certification decision. Subtle laboratory glassware and a faint helix-pattern of light particles drift in the bokeh background. A single fresh-green indicator light accents the scene, signalling go or no-go judgement. Soft directional window light from the left, creamy bokeh, premium glass and metal materials, calm authoritative atmosphere, deep navy and teal-cyan palette with a subtle fresh-green accent. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
